name: InterContinental Chennai Mahabalipuram Resort
description: A luxury beachfront resort offering sophisticated rooms, fine dining, and serene spa experiences overlooking the Bay of Bengal.

name: Radisson Blu Resort Temple Bay Mamallapuram
description: An expansive 44-acre resort known for its signature winding pool, proximity to the Shore Temple, and premium coastal amenities.

name: Taj Fisherman's Cove Resort
description: Built on the ramparts of an old Dutch fort, this iconic property offers lush landscapes and a tranquil seaside escape.

name: Four Points by Sheraton Mahabalipuram Resort & Convention Center
description: A contemporary hotel featuring well-appointed rooms, expansive meeting spaces, and modern leisure facilities for both business and leisure travelers.

name: Grande Bay Resort and Spa
description: A charming, eco-friendly resort set amidst tropical gardens, offering a peaceful retreat within walking distance of the beach.
